hearing held. ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ FINANCIAL SERVICES USA LLC DEMURRER to COMPLAINT. After hearing argument, Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Christopher C. Hite; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CCH)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Continued To Feb-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference

Chunlei Liu, 415-577-0007 chunleiliure@gmail.com Plaintiff, In Pro Per

Erik W. Kemp, Esq., STINSON LLP 415.398.3344 erik.kemp@stinson.com Attorney for Defendant MERCEDES-BENZ FINANCIAL SERVICES USA LLC.

Plaintiff's contest was received by court late. Hearing held. Discussed, not ARGUED. Plaintiff's counsel advises the Court that their opposition was filed on January 20, 2026. Court acknowledges Plaintiffs late filed opposition filed on January 20, 2026. Defendants' counsel requests an opportunity to submit a reply to plaintiff's late filed opposition by Friday January 23, 2025. Court vacates its tentative ruling and rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ FINANCIAL SERVICES USA LLC DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is continued to February 3, 2026. Defendant may file a reply to plaintiff's late filed opposition by January 23, 2026.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
